candidates.source: research/deribit_data_strategy_research.md §3 C2 (reserved future family, D4 data now ingested); Pan-Poteshman-style informed option flow literature
candidates.mechanism: Deribit put/call taker-buy premium imbalance (value_num = (put_taker_buy − call_taker_buy)/total_taker_buy, hourly, bucket-end published_at) as an informed-flow / hedging-pressure state variable; daily long/flat time-series book on BTC/ETH perps that is long when put-dominant flow is absent (z low) and flat under put-demand extremes

candidates.source: mechanism-taxonomy microstructure/liquidity cell; Amihud (2002) illiquidity premium; crypto XS liquidity literature
candidates.mechanism: Cross-sectional Amihud illiquidity (|daily return| / dollar volume from canonical 1m-derived daily bars) over the PIT USDT-perp universe (29–33 complete symbols on probe days); weekly dollar-neutral long-illiquid / short-liquid rank book harvesting the illiquidity premium

candidates.source: mechanism-taxonomy onchain/liquidity frontier; stablecoin-supply-as-dry-powder literature (Griffin-Shams Tether line, descendants)
